philosophy: Viewer-first titles. The geopolitical event is the CASE STUDY. The power lesson is the HOOK. The viewer clicks because they see THEMSELVES.

thumbnail_system.name: Yin-Yang Thumbnail Text
rules: Must be readable at mobile thumbnail size
Should trigger an emotional reaction BEFORE the viewer reads the title
If the title is analytical, the thumbnail is emotional
If the title is emotional, the thumbnail is specific
Thumbnail text and title must be DIFFERENT but complementary

DARK COMMAND.note: Always ALL CAPS imperative. Must start with NEVER, STOP, or DON'T.
examples: NEVER Let Them See Your Strategy

Consequence.note: What happens if you break the command. Short, punchy.

Framework.note: Attribution to a power framework or real-world proof.

examples.title: NEVER Let Them See Your Strategy. Here's Why — Law 3 of Power
STOP Trusting Allies. This Is What Happens — The Pentagon Just Proved It
NEVER Show Your Wealth. It Makes You a Target — Machiavelli

formulas.name: How To Power Move Using Real Event as Proof
formulas.template: How to [Power Verb] [Target] Using [Weapon They Don't Expect]

Target.note: What the viewer could target or learn to target. Not a country name — a concept.

Weapon They Don't Expect.note: The unexpected tool, method, or mechanism. Real-world event is proof.

examples.title: How to Destroy Your Competition Using the Government as Your Weapon
How to Control a $400 Billion Economy With a $20,000 Tool
How to Kill a Company in 4 Hours (OpenAI Just Showed You)

Named Principle/Trap/Weapon.note: Give the mechanism a NAME. Include a specific number when possible.

Shocking Outcome.note: The consequence. Must be specific and visceral.
examples: Controls Who Eats and Who Starves

examples.title: The Chokepoint Trap That Holds $400 Billion Hostage
The 4-Hour Power Play That Killed America's Best AI Company
The $20,000 Weapon That Makes Billion-Dollar Defenses Useless

formulas.name: Why Thing You Trust Is Actually Dark Truth

Trusted Thing.note: Something the viewer trusts, uses, or takes for granted.

Weapon/Trap/Lie.note: The dark reality behind the trusted thing.
examples: a Trap for the Middle Class

examples.title: Why 'National Security' Is Actually a Weapon to Pick Winners
Why Your AI Subscription Is Actually Funding Military Intelligence
Why Oil Wealth Is Actually a Hostage Asset — Law 48 of Power

Someone/System.note: An entity or system the viewer interacts with.

Dark Action.note: A dark action being done TO the viewer.

Framework Tag.note: Power framework attribution. Optional but preferred.

examples.title: 5 Signs Your Government Is Rigging the Market — Machiavelli Warned You
7 Signs a Company Is About to Get Assassinated — The Pentagon Playbook
4 Signs You're in Someone's Trap and Don't Know It

critical_rules: The VIEWER must see themselves in every title. The event is the case study, not the subject.
Every title must make the viewer think 'I need to learn this to protect myself' or 'I need to understand this power dynamic.'
Never lead with a country name or company name. Lead with the POWER LESSON.
Include at least one specific number in 3 of the 4 title options per idea.
For each title, generate a 2-5 word ALL CAPS thumbnail text that is DIFFERENT from the title but complements it emotionally.
